name: HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_PASSENGERS
description: HNS VEHICLE INCIDENT EVENT PASSENGERS. This table stores Passenger information related to an vehicle incident event.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Passenger Identifier.Primary key for HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_PASSENGERS table.

columns.Name: VEH_INC_EVT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Vehicle Incident Event Detail identifier. Foreign key for HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.Comments: EMPLOYEE_ID column  : Employee ID. If Passenger is an employee.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_ID column  : Assignment ID. If Passenger is an employee.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_PER_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_PERSON lookup. To check whether the Passenger is an employee or not.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_NAME
columns.Comments: Passenger Name (for Non Employee).

columns.Name: PASSENGER_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Email id of non employee.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM
columns.Comments: PASSENGER_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM : Passenger phone country code number.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: PASSENGER_AREA_CODE column : Passenger phone area code number.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_PHONE_NUM
columns.Comments: Passenger phone number. This is for non employee only.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_ADDR_LINE1
columns.Comments: Address Line1 of the Passenger (non employee).

columns.Name: PASSENGER_ADDR_LINE2
columns.Comments: Address Line2 of the Passenger (non employee).

columns.Name: PASSENGER_ADDR_CITY
columns.Comments: Address city of the Passenger (non employee).

columns.Name: PASSENGER_ADDR_STATE
columns.Comments: Address State of the Passenger (non employee).

columns.Name: PASSENGER_ZIP_CODE
columns.Comments: Address Zip code of the Passenger (non employee).

columns.Name: PASSENGER_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Address Country of the Passenger (non employee).

columns.Name: PASSENGER_INJURED_FLAG
columns.Comments: PASSENGER_INJURED_FLAG column : Was passenger Injured Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: WEARING_SEAT_BELT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Seat Belt in Use by passenger Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: TAKEN_TO_HOSPITAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: TAKEN_TO_HOSPITAL_FLAG column : Taken to Hospital Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: PASSENGER_FATALITY_FLAG
columns.Comments: PASSENGER_FATALITY_FLAG column : Fatality Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the Vehicle Passenger is checked for deletion.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: POSITION_OF_PASSENGER_CODE
columns.Comments: Position code of passenger at Time of Accident. Lookup from ORA_HNS_PASSENGER_POSITION
